zh-TW.title: 手機控制基礎
zh-TW.summary: 建立手機控制介面的起點，認識觸控輸入如何成為可操作的控制訊號。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 先從手機端互動基礎出發，讓學員理解 touch 與 mouse 的差異，並建立最小可用的控制畫面，作為後續 BLE 遙控與資料封包設計的起點。
coreContent: 認識手機瀏覽器的互動限制
比較 touch 與 mouse 事件差異
建立最小可用的控制畫面

en.title: Mobile Control Foundation
en.summary: Establish the starting point for a mobile control interface and turn touch input into usable control signals.
en.description: This lesson introduces the foundations of mobile interaction, highlights the difference between touch and mouse events, and builds the smallest workable control screen as the starting point for BLE remote control and payload design.
coreContent: Understand the interaction limits of mobile browsers
Compare touch and mouse event behavior
Build the smallest usable control screen

zh-TW.title: 互動細節調整
zh-TW.summary: 整理觸控事件、長按與版面行為，讓操作體驗更穩定、更接近可交付產品。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 進一步處理 preventDefault、事件處理與 flexbox 版面配置，讓控制介面在不同裝置上都能維持一致而可靠的操作手感。
coreContent: 定義控制面板的狀態切換
讓畫布搖桿與狀態顯示同步
建立可維護的 UI 元件結構

en.title: Interaction Polish
en.summary: Refine touch events, long-press behavior, and layout handling to make the experience feel stable and product-ready.
en.description: This lesson continues with preventDefault handling, event behavior, and flexbox layout so the control interface feels consistent and reliable across devices.
coreContent: Handle preventDefault and event bubbling
Design long-press and repeat-input behavior
Use flexbox to organize the control layout

zh-TW.title: 控制介面與狀態
zh-TW.summary: 把控制面板、狀態回饋與畫布搖桿整合成一套可維護的互動架構。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 讓控制 UI 開始具備狀態同步與視覺回饋，並透過畫布搖桿與元件結構整理，建立可延伸的前端控制架構。
coreContent: 理解 typed array 與 binary payload
建立非同步 BLE 連線流程
設計權限、配對與安全檢查

en.title: Control UI and State
en.summary: Integrate the control panel, state feedback, and canvas joystick into a maintainable interaction structure.
en.description: This lesson gives the control UI state synchronization and visual feedback, then organizes the canvas joystick and component structure into a scalable frontend control architecture.
coreContent: Define state transitions for the control panel
Sync the canvas joystick with status display
Build a maintainable UI component structure

zh-TW.title: 控制資料建模
zh-TW.summary: 將前端操作轉換為可傳輸、可重用的控制資料模型。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 把搖桿數學、流程邏輯與 JSON 封包整合在一起，讓學員能把使用者操作轉成後端或裝置端可直接接收的控制資料。

en.title: Control Data Modeling
en.summary: Convert frontend actions into a transportable and reusable control data model.
en.description: This lesson combines joystick math, flow logic, and JSON payload design so students can turn user actions into control data that downstream systems can consume directly.
coreContent: Turn joystick input into numeric coordinates
Design flow logic and control states
Build a JSON control packet for transport

zh-TW.title: BLE 上線準備
zh-TW.summary: 完成 binary 資料、非同步流程與安全檢查，準備進入 BLE 上線階段。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 將手機控制主線接到 typed arrays、非同步 BLE 流程與安全設計，讓學員具備將前端控制正式上線的最後準備。

en.title: BLE Readiness
en.summary: Prepare for BLE rollout by covering binary data, async flow, and security checks.
en.description: This lesson connects mobile control to typed arrays, asynchronous BLE flows, and security design so students are ready for the final rollout stage.
coreContent: Understand typed arrays and binary payloads
Build an asynchronous BLE connection flow
Design permission, pairing, and security checks
